{{Quote|I know Flennic's type. He'll have a chip on his shoulder bigger than a Super Star Destroyer.|[[Mara Jade Skywalker]]|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant">''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]''</ref>}}
'''Kurlen Flennic''' was the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bureaucrat/Legends|bureaucrat]] who served as [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] of [[Yaga Minor/Legends|Yaga Minor]]. Under [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Flennic was appointed to that position by [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] himself, and was still a Moff as of the signing of the [[Pellaeon–Gavrisom Treaty]] in [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|He understands nothing but force–and I'm not talking about the one you Jedi regard so highly, either. I'm talking about the brute sort.|[[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]]|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant" />}}
After the arrest of [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Vilim Disra|Disra]], Flennic became the main voice of the 'old guard' faction of the Council. In this regard, he was in opposition to Moff [[Ephin Sarreti|Sarreti]] (Disra's successor) and [[Supreme Commander (Galactic Empire)/Legends|Supreme Commander]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]], who advocated for a more progressive stance on foreign and domestic affairs.

Flennic retained his post until at least the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. He was beneficial in driving back the Yuuzhan Vong during the [[Battle of Yaga Minor (Yuuzhan Vong War)|battle]] of [[Yaga Minor/Legends|Yaga Minor]], through the use of his sector fleet. Flennic held off the Yuuzhan Vong forces long enough until Pellaeon's reinforcements arrived, at which time [[B'shith Vorrik]] retreated. During that time, he became so frustrated with Pellaeon's tactics that he came close to assassinating the Supreme Commander with a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]]. However, his aim was spoiled by a [[The Force/Legends|Force]] nudge from [[Mara Jade Skywalker]] and the blaster bolt went harmlessly over Pellaeon's shoulder. After Flennic was taken into custody, Pellaeon agreed to overlook the attempt on his life as caused by the stresses of war, and allow the Moff to retain his post and his freedom, if he submitted to the [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral's]] proposals.
